basicDetails.schemeName: Madhya Pradesh Kalakar Evam Sahityakar Kalyan Kosh Niyam- Disability Assistance

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The “Madhya Pradesh Kalakar Evam Sahityakar Kalyan Kosh Niyam- Disability Assistance” scheme has been launched by the Department of Culture, Government of Madhya Pradesh. Under this scheme, one-time monetary support is provided to eligible disabled artists and litterateurs for disability-related medical treatment. The assistance helps beneficiaries manage treatment expenses arising from permanent or severe physical disability.
schemeContent.benefits_md: - One-time financial assistance of up to ₹1,00,000/-. - Assistance is provided exclusively for the treatment of physical disability. > **NOTE:** Direct transfer to the beneficiary’s bank account.
schemeContent.exclusions_md: 1. The applicant should not be a government employee. 1. The applicant should not be employed in autonomous or semi-government institutions.
schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide one-time financial assistance to physically disabled artists and litterateurs for disability-related medical treatment and rehabilitation.

children.text: The “Madhya Pradesh Kalakar Evam Sahityakar Kalyan Kosh Niyam- Disability Assistance” scheme has been launched by the Department of Culture, Government of Madhya Pradesh. Under this scheme, one-time monetary support is provided to eligible disabled artists and litterateurs for disability-related medical treatment. The assistance helps beneficiaries manage treatment expenses arising from permanent or severe physical disability.
One-time financial assistance of up to ₹1,00,000/-.
Assistance is provided exclusively for the treatment of physical disability.
NOTE:
Direct transfer to the beneficiary’s bank account.
The applicant should not be a government employee.
The applicant should not be employed in autonomous or semi-government institutions.
Step 1:
The interested applicant downloads the
application form
Page No. 8
) from the official website.
Step 2:
In the application form, fill in all the mandatory fields, and attach copies of all the mandatory documents (self-attest, if required).
Step 3:
Submit the duly filled and signed application form along with the documents to the Director, Directorate of Culture, Madhya Pradesh.

applicationProcess.process_md: **Step 1:** The interested applicant downloads the [application form](https://www.culturemp.in/pdfs/kalakar-kalyan-kosh-yojna-2023.pdf) (**Page No. 8**) from the official website. **Step 2:** In the application form, fill in all the mandatory fields, and attach copies of all the mandatory documents (self-attest, if required). **Step 3:** Submit the duly filled and signed application form along with the documents to the Director, Directorate of Culture, Madhya Pradesh.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. The applicant should be a resident of Madhya Pradesh. 1. The applicant should be a physically disabled artist or litterateur. 1. The applicant should be 21 years of age or above. 1. The applicant’s monthly income from all sources, including spouse income, should not exceed ₹10,000. 1. The total monthly family income, including dependents, should not exceed ₹20,000. > **NOTE:** Income limits are revised annually with a 6 percent increase for eligibility calculation.

children.text: The applicant should be a resident of Madhya Pradesh.
The applicant should be a physically disabled artist or litterateur.
The applicant should be 21 years of age or above.
The applicant’s monthly income from all sources, including spouse income, should not exceed ₹10,000.
The total monthly family income, including dependents, should not exceed ₹20,000.
NOTE:
Income limits are revised annually with a 6 percent increase for eligibility calculation.
